feature: Expanded URL-based Social Media Connections from 13 to 25 Platforms
summary: Tested expanded URL adapter feature. All 25 backend API tests pass (100%). Frontend verified showing 123 total platforms, URL badges (API/URL/via URL), credential modal with URL tab, and live metrics from new platforms (Bluesky 32.3M, Telegram 10.4M followers with LIVE badges).

backend_api_tests.test: GET /api/social/url-supported has url_examples dict with 25+ entries
POST /api/social/connect-url connects GitHub via URL (returns metrics)
GET /api/social/connections includes url_example for new platforms
New platforms (github, medium, bluesky) in platform config

frontend_tests.test: Analytics tab shows 3 Live, 8 Simulated badges
Analytics shows Bluesky with LIVE badge and 32.3M followers
Analytics shows Telegram with LIVE badge and 10.4M followers
Analytics shows Live API Integration Active info banner
Platform cards show URL connect badge for new platforms
Platform cards show 'via URL' badge for URL-connected platforms
GitHub platform card shows Live, URL, and via URL badges
Discord platform card shows connected via URL
Bluesky platform card has URL connect badge

url_supported_endpoint.description: Returns 25 platforms with URL adapters (expanded from 13)

new_platforms_detection.description: All 12 new platforms detected correctly from URLs

connect_url_endpoint.description: Successfully connects new platforms via URL with initial_metrics for GitHub, Bluesky, Telegram, Discord

bulk_connect.description: Bulk connects multiple new platforms at once

live_metrics.description: Live metrics working for new platforms

critical_code_review_comments: 25 URL adapters properly implemented (12 new platforms added)
URL detection patterns handle multiple URL formats for each platform
GitHub API returns real follower/repo data via public API
Telegram parses public t.me pages for subscriber counts
Discord uses discord.com/api/v10/invites endpoint for server member counts
All 123 platforms displayed in frontend dashboard
Platform cards show appropriate badges (API/URL/via URL)
Analytics tab shows LIVE/SIM badges distinguishing data sources
seed_data_creation: Platforms connected via URL during testing: Bluesky, Discord, GitHub (torvalds), Telegram, Medium, Dailymotion, Audiomack

mocked_api.description: All URL adapters make real HTTP requests to public pages/APIs. Live metrics verified for Bluesky (32.3M), Telegram (10.4M), Discord, GitHub.

context_for_next_testing_agent: URL-based connection feature expanded to 25 platforms (from 13). New platforms: github, medium, kick, bluesky, telegram, discord, tumblr, dailymotion, bandcamp, audiomack, mixcloud, snapchat. Platform config now has 123 total platforms (github, medium, bluesky added). Live metrics working for Bluesky (32.3M followers), Telegram (10.4M), Discord, GitHub. Frontend shows Total Platforms: 123, platform cards have API/URL/via URL badges.
